name: Incident Resolution Plan Agentic Workflow
serviceNowSurface: AI Agent Studio for plan generation with human approval
businessOutcome: Create a consistent resolution plan for incidents while keeping assignment, customer communication, and closure under human control.
steps: Summarize the incident and missing data.
Check known issue patterns and related incidents.
Recommend assignment group or escalation path.
Flag VIP, security, and outage indicators.
Ask for human approval before outbound communication.
Produce a work note draft and resolution plan.
